title: Pillowy Briny Malaysian Ume Plum Skewers
description: A festive Malaysian dish featuring ume-plum, grilled to perfection on a tava-griddle over binchotan-charcoal, with a pillowy texture and briny flavor, this dish is perfect for any occasion. It is also raw-friendly, making it a great option for those looking for a lighter meal.
instructions: Soak the bamboo skewers in water for at least 30 minutes before grilling.
In a blender, combine coconut milk, sea salt, brown sugar, lemon juice, ginger paste, and garlic paste, and blend until smooth.
Thread the ume-plum onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each plum.
Brush the tava-griddle with a small amount of coconut oil and heat it over the binchotan-charcoal.
Grill the ume-plum skewers for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they are slightly charred.
Brush the skewers with the coconut milk mixture during the last minute of grilling.
Serve the Pillowy Briny Malaysian Ume Plum Skewers warm, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
